name: Information Security Policy Currency
description: Measures whether key security policies are reviewed and approved within defined timeframes
formula: (Number of policies reviewed on schedule / Total policies requiring review) × 100

name: Security Roles Assignment Completeness
description: Percentage of defined security roles that have assigned accountable individuals
formula: (Security roles with assigned owners / Total defined security roles) × 100

name: SoD Violations
description: Number of identified segregation of duties conflicts in critical systems
formula: Count of active SoD violations in critical systems

name: Threat Intelligence Integration
description: Percentage of critical threat feeds integrated and actively consumed
formula: (Active threat feeds / Subscribed threat feeds) × 100

name: Authority Contact List Currency
description: Whether authority/regulator contact list is reviewed and current
formula: Days since last review of authority contact list

name: Projects with Security Review
description: Percentage of projects that completed security review before go-live
formula: (Projects with security sign-off / Total projects deployed) × 100

name: Emergency Change Rate
description: Percentage of changes classified as emergency bypassing normal CAB
formula: (Emergency changes / Total changes) × 100

name: Failed Change Rate
description: Percentage of changes that were rolled back or caused incidents
formula: (Failed changes / Total changes) × 100

name: Asset Inventory Coverage
description: Percentage of IT assets discovered that are in the CMDB
formula: (Assets in CMDB / Assets discovered by scanning) × 100

name: Shadow IT Instances Detected
description: Number of unapproved cloud services discovered in use
formula: Count of unapproved SaaS/cloud services detected

name: Data Classification Coverage
description: Percentage of data repositories with classification applied
formula: (Classified repositories / Total data repositories) × 100

name: Unencrypted Sensitive Data Transfers
description: Number of sensitive data transfers detected without encryption
formula: Count of unencrypted sensitive data transfers detected

name: Data Retention Policy Compliance
description: Percentage of data stores compliant with retention policy
formula: (Compliant data stores / Total data stores) × 100

name: MFA Adoption Rate
description: Percentage of user accounts with MFA enabled
formula: (Accounts with MFA / Total user accounts) × 100

name: Orphaned Accounts
description: Number of accounts belonging to terminated employees still active
formula: Count of active accounts for terminated employees

name: Access Review Completion Rate
description: Percentage of access reviews completed on schedule
formula: (Completed access reviews / Scheduled access reviews) × 100

name: Privileged Account Count
description: Number of accounts with privileged/admin access
formula: Count of accounts in privileged groups

name: Vendor Security Assessment Coverage
description: Percentage of critical/high-risk vendors with current security assessment
formula: (Assessed vendors / Total critical vendors) × 100

name: Vendor SOC 2 Report Currency
description: Percentage of critical vendors with valid SOC 2 Type II report
formula: (Vendors with current SOC 2 / Total vendors requiring SOC 2) × 100

name: Vendor Security Rating Score
description: Average external security rating of critical vendors
formula: Mean score from BitSight/SecurityScorecard for critical vendors

name: Third-Party Security Incidents
description: Number of security incidents involving third parties in reporting period
formula: Count of incidents with vendor involvement

name: SBOM Coverage for Critical Applications
description: Percentage of critical applications with current SBOM
formula: (Apps with SBOM / Total critical applications) × 100

name: Cloud Misconfiguration Findings
description: Number of high/critical misconfigurations detected in cloud environments
formula: Count of high/critical findings from CSPM

name: Cloud Admin MFA Coverage
description: Percentage of cloud admin accounts with MFA enabled
formula: (Cloud admins with MFA / Total cloud admin accounts) × 100

name: Public Cloud Resources
description: Number of cloud resources with public access enabled
formula: Count of S3 buckets, storage accounts, DBs with public access

name: Background Check Completion Rate
description: Percentage of new hires in sensitive roles with completed background checks
formula: (New hires with completed checks / Total new hires in sensitive roles) × 100

name: Termination Access Revocation Time
description: Average time between termination and access revocation
formula: Mean hours from HR termination to last access revoked

name: NDA Compliance for Sensitive Roles
description: Percentage of employees in sensitive roles with signed NDA
formula: (Employees with NDA / Total in sensitive roles) × 100

name: Security Awareness Training Completion
description: Percentage of employees who completed annual security training
formula: (Employees completed training / Total employees) × 100

name: Phishing Simulation Click Rate
description: Percentage of employees who clicked simulated phishing email
formula: (Employees who clicked / Total employees tested) × 100

name: Security Event Report Volume
description: Number of security events reported by employees
formula: Count of employee-reported security events

name: VPN Usage for Remote Access
description: Percentage of remote sessions using corporate VPN
formula: (VPN sessions / Total remote sessions) × 100

name: Mobile Device Compliance Rate
description: Percentage of mobile devices compliant with security policy
formula: (Compliant devices / Total enrolled devices) × 100

name: Physical Access Control Effectiveness
description: Number of unauthorized physical access attempts detected
formula: Count of failed/unauthorized badge attempts to secure areas

name: Visitor Log Compliance
description: Percentage of visitors properly logged and escorted
formula: (Properly logged visitors / Total visitors) × 100

name: Environmental Monitoring Uptime
description: Percentage uptime of environmental monitoring systems
formula: (Monitoring system uptime / Total time) × 100

name: UPS/Generator Test Compliance
description: Whether UPS and generator tests completed on schedule
formula: (Tests completed on schedule / Scheduled tests) × 100

name: Equipment Disposal Compliance
description: Percentage of disposed equipment with verified data sanitization
formula: (Verified sanitized / Total disposed) × 100

name: EDR Coverage
description: Percentage of endpoints with active EDR agent
formula: (Endpoints with EDR / Total managed endpoints) × 100

name: Endpoint Encryption Coverage
description: Percentage of endpoints with full disk encryption enabled
formula: (Encrypted endpoints / Total endpoints) × 100

name: Malware Detection Rate
description: Number of malware detections in reporting period
formula: Count of malware detections from EDR/AV

name: Ransomware Readiness Score
description: Composite score of ransomware prevention/detection/recovery controls
formula: Weighted score of backup, segmentation, EDR, patching, user training

name: Network Segmentation Compliance
description: Percentage of network segments compliant with segmentation policy
formula: (Compliant segments / Total segments) × 100

name: Blocked Malicious Traffic
description: Volume of blocked malicious traffic at perimeter
formula: Count of blocked malicious connections

name: Critical Vulnerability Remediation Time
description: Mean time to remediate critical vulnerabilities
formula: Average days from discovery to remediation for critical vulns

name: Vulnerability Scan Coverage
description: Percentage of assets scanned for vulnerabilities in last 30 days
formula: (Scanned assets / Total assets) × 100

name: Open Critical Vulnerabilities
description: Count of unpatched critical vulnerabilities older than SLA
formula: Count of critical vulns open beyond remediation SLA

name: Patch Compliance Rate
description: Percentage of systems patched within policy timeframe
formula: (Patched systems / Total systems) × 100

name: SAST Coverage in CI/CD
description: Percentage of applications with SAST integrated in pipeline
formula: (Apps with SAST / Total apps in CI/CD) × 100

name: Security Testing Before Release
description: Percentage of releases with security testing completed
formula: (Releases with security test / Total releases) × 100

name: Critical Dependency Vulnerabilities
description: Count of critical vulnerabilities in production dependencies
formula: Count of critical CVEs in production app dependencies

name: Secrets in Code Repositories
description: Number of secrets/credentials detected in code repos
formula: Count of secrets detected by scanning

name: Weak Cipher Usage
description: Number of systems using deprecated cryptographic algorithms
formula: Count of systems with weak ciphers (DES, MD5, SHA-1, SSLv3)

name: Encryption Key Rotation Compliance
description: Percentage of encryption keys rotated per policy
formula: (Keys rotated on schedule / Keys requiring rotation) × 100

name: SIEM Log Source Coverage
description: Percentage of critical systems sending logs to SIEM
formula: (Critical systems with logging / Total critical systems) × 100

name: Alert Investigation Time
description: Mean time to investigate security alerts
formula: Average time from alert to investigation start

name: NTP Synchronization Compliance
description: Percentage of systems synchronized to authorized time source
formula: (Synchronized systems / Total systems) × 100

name: Mean Time to Detect (MTTD)
description: Average time to detect security incidents
formula: Mean time from incident start to detection

name: Mean Time to Respond (MTTR)
description: Average time to contain security incidents
formula: Mean time from detection to containment

name: Incident Response Plan Test Currency
description: Days since last IR plan tabletop or simulation
formula: Days since last IR exercise

name: Backup Success Rate
description: Percentage of scheduled backups completed successfully
formula: (Successful backups / Scheduled backups) × 100

name: Backup Recovery Test Success
description: Percentage of backup recovery tests completed successfully
formula: (Successful restore tests / Total restore tests) × 100

name: DR Test Currency
description: Days since last DR failover test
formula: Days since last DR test

name: RTO Achievement Rate
description: Percentage of systems meeting defined RTO in tests/incidents
formula: (Systems meeting RTO / Systems with defined RTO) × 100

name: Privacy Impact Assessment Completion
description: Percentage of new processing activities with completed DPIA
formula: (Completed DPIAs / Required DPIAs) × 100

name: Data Subject Request Response Time
description: Average time to respond to data subject requests
formula: Mean days to complete DSR

name: Audit Finding Closure Rate
description: Percentage of audit findings closed within agreed timeframe
formula: (Findings closed on time / Total findings due) × 100

name: Open High-Risk Audit Findings
description: Count of high-risk audit findings open beyond due date
formula: Count of overdue high-risk findings
